---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the situation where the current behaviour falls short.

## Who does it affect

Mark all that apply:

- [ ] Solo developer
- [ ] Small team (2–10)
- [ ] Agency or consultancy
- [ ] Enterprise / large org

## Proposed solution

Describe what you want dsforge to do. If you have a specific interface in mind (a new command, a new config field, a new output file), describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternative approaches have you tried or considered? Why are they insufficient?
